basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) has officially announced the Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 with 3 project-based vacancies. Candidates who have completed a Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course and meet the age criteria of a maximum of 30 years are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their online applications on or before 01 July 2026. Check the official notification for eligibility details, salary, selection process, and application procedure.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years (with relaxation for SC/ST and OBC)
age_limit.details: Project Nurse II: Maximum Age: 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates: 5 years. Age relaxation for OBC (NCL) candidates: 3 years.

qualification.details: Project Nurse II: Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course. Prior experience in health-related projects, Trauma and Emergency, qualitative research is desirable. Proficiency in Marathi, Hindi and English. Well-versed in computers and file management using MS Office, PowerPoint, Excel, and Google Sheets, Forms, and Docs. Good communication skills.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse-II: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA, as admissible

selection_process: Screening of applications Shortlisting of candidates In-person interview Written or skills test (may be conducted)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Project Nurse II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Nurse II: Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course. Prior experience in health-related projects, Trauma and Emergency, qualitative research is desirable. Proficiency in Marathi, Hindi and English. Well-versed in computers and file management using MS Office, PowerPoint, Excel, and Google Sheets, Forms, and Docs. Good communication skills.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Nurse II: Maximum Age: 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates: 5 years. Age relaxation for OBC (NCL) candidates: 3 years.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Nurse-II: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA, as admissible

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Shortlisting of candidates In-person interview Written or skills test (may be conducted)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Project Nurse-II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Nurse-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Nurse-II position at AIIMS Nagpur is July 1, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course to be eligible for the Project Nurse-II position. Additional experience and skills are desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse-II position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Nurse-II post announced by AIIMS Nagpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse-II role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse-II position is 30 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Nurse-II post will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Nurse-II recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only. A Google Form link will be provided for the application process.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the AIIMS Project Nurse-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse-II post?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening of applications, shortlisting of candidates, and an in-person interview. A written or skills test may also be conducted.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Nagpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this AIIMS Nagpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Nurse-II position at AIIMS Nagpur is a project-based role, implying it is a contractual appointment for the duration of the specific project.
